name: Check Screen Recording Permission
command:
#!/bin/bash
# Find meetings DB dynamically
MEETINGS_DB=$(for db in ~/PAPR/jobs/*/data/data.db; do sqlite3 "$db" "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE name='meetings'" 2>/dev/null | grep -q meetings && echo "$db" && break; done)
if [ -z "$MEETINGS_DB" ]; then echo "ERROR: meetings DB not found"; exit 1; fi
# Find recorder binary dynamically
RECORDER=$(find ~/PAPR/jobs/*/recorder -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1)
if [ -z "$RECORDER" ]; then echo "ERROR: recorder binary not found"; exit 1; fi
RESULT=$($RECORDER --check-permission 2>&1)
echo "$RESULT"
sqlite3 "$MEETINGS_DB" "DELETE FROM permission_checks; INSERT INTO permission_checks (check_time, result) VALUES (datetime('now'), '$RESULT');"
echo "Written to DB: $RESULT"
